platformIntelligence.name: Blinkit
strengths: Scale, dark-store density, high-frequency grocery behavior
platformIntelligence.gtmImplication: Use as benchmark, not entry wedge.
platformIntelligence.sourceNote: Economic Times article citing BofA market-share context.

platformIntelligence.name: Zepto
platformIntelligence.currentRole: High-growth quick-commerce challenger with sourced funding and valuation context.
strengths: Useful benchmark for fast-moving challenger GTM
risks: Funding strength is not proof of campaign efficiency
platformIntelligence.gtmImplication: Benchmark Zepto for urgency-led creative and youth-heavy city pockets; do not infer conversion rates without pilot data.

platformIntelligence.name: Swiggy Instamart
platformIntelligence.gtmImplication: Useful benchmark for store density and MTU growth.

platformIntelligence.name: BigBasket Now
platformIntelligence.currentRole: Quick-commerce participant; exact public metrics are not loaded in this project.
strengths: Potential fit for planned basket and household categories
risks: No sourced quick-commerce metrics currently loaded
Needs separate source validation before benchmarking
platformIntelligence.gtmImplication: Use as a qualitative platform lens only until sourced public metrics are added.
platformIntelligence.sourceNote: Needs source in this project file before public metric claims.

platformIntelligence.name: Dunzo - historical failure case
platformIntelligence.gtmImplication: Do not copy growth without unit-economics guardrails.
platformIntelligence.sourceNote: Historical failure framing is intentionally marked needs source for public claims.
